name: the config surface governs the routed 3rd-party path: disabling a tool-native check clears the routed verdict
command:
printf 'import os
' > x.py && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
rules:
  ruff/F401: off
' > ctp.config.yaml && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file x.py --profile ctp.config.yaml 2>d.txt; dc=$?; [ "$dc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'disabled=1' d.txt && echo config-governs-thirdparty 1>&2; else echo config-governs-thirdparty 1>&2; fi
